description: Alice requests two calendar changes: create a new hire onboarding session on Tuesday at 10 AM, and move the Thursday weekly check-in from 2 PM to 4 PM.

events.title: New Hire Onboarding
events.reasoning: Alice requests a new onboarding session for a new hire on Tuesday at 10 AM in HR Conference Room 1.
events.assumptions: Assumed 1-hour duration as no end time specified. Emily will be added later, so not included as attendee.

events.title: Weekly Check-In
events.reasoning: Alice moves the Thursday weekly check-in from 2 PM to 4 PM. Duration preserved. Matches calendar event [1].
events.assumptions: Duration preserved as 1 hour from the original event.

mock_llm_response.summary: Two changes: created new hire onboarding on Tuesday and moved weekly check-in to 4 PM Thursday.

notes: Reference datetime is 2026-02-20 (Friday). Tuesday = 2026-02-24, Thursday = 2026-02-26. calendar_context[0] (Weekly Check-In) so existing_event_id=1.
